title: Lettre du Ministre slovaque des AE confirmant le maintien de la Slovaquie en tant qu'Etat successeur de la Tchécoslovaquie
text_preview: DEPUTY PRIME MINISTER FOREIGN AFFAIRS MINISTER Milan Knaž ko Bratislava, 3. 3. 1993 No.: 1171/93/KM Excellency, I have the honour to inform you that the Government of the Slovak Republic as one of successors of the for- mer Czech and Slovak Federal Republic declares its in- tention of continuing full membership in the International Vine and wine Office (Office International de la Vigne et du Vine) under the designat…

pages.text:
DEPUTY PRIME MINISTER

FOREIGN AFFAIRS MINISTER

Milan Knaž ko

Bratislava, 3. 3. 1993

No.: 1171/93/KM

Excellency,

I have the honour to inform you that the Government of the Slovak Republic as one of successors of the for- mer Czech and Slovak Federal Republic declares its in- tention of continuing full membership in the International

Vine and wine Office (Office International de la Vigne et du Vine) under the designation of the Slovak Republic and declares that it will accept the obligations of the mem- bership.

Please accept, Excellency, the assurances of my dis- tinguished consideration.

Yours faithfully

H. E.

Minister for Foreign Affairs of the French Republic 37, quai d'Orsay

Paris

..

23

749/93

L Ambassade de la République Slovaque présente ses compliments au Ministère des Affaires Etrangères, Protocole at a l'honneur de Lui faire parvenir la lettre concernante la succession de la République Slovaque à l'Office International de la Vigne et du Vin envovée par le vice-premier ministre et ministre des Affaires Etrangères M. Milan Knažko a son

Excellence Monsieur Roland Dumas.

哭

Paris, le 23 Mars 1993

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères

Protocole 37, Quai d'orsay 75016

Paris
